title: Breaking into Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 2–5.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Prisoner No. E8200, buggy the clown.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Prisoner No. Do469, former Baroque works agent,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Blugori can't stand against them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We believe they're heading to level 4!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'll leave the mess upstairs to saltdeath...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then I will execute them myself!!!
